overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking along a coastal path at sunset. The character travels through rocky cliff terrain, open grasslands with a stream, a traditional Japanese village, and finally reaches a cliff edge overlooking the ocean with distant snow-capped mountains visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain path between rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path winding between tall rocky cliff faces

entered.detail: tall gray rock formation forming the left wall of the path
tall gray rock formation forming the right wall of the path
burning torch mounted on the right cliff face providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow enclosed mountain path between tall rocky cliffs. A lit torch burns on the right cliff face, and the path winds through the rocky terrain with sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with stream and distant rock formations

events.description: exits narrow cliff path into open grassland with small stream
location text 'MUSHA ISLAND' appears briefly on screen

agents.ego_description: walking through tall golden grass following a winding stream toward the setting sun

entered.detail: field of tall golden grass swaying in the wind
narrow water stream running alongside the dirt path
large natural rock arch visible in the distance against the sunset
traditional Japanese wooden building with dark roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide grassland with a stream running alongside the path. Tall golden grass sways in the wind as the character approaches a distant rock arch and traditional buildings. The location text 'MUSHA ISLAND' appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese village with wooden houses and drying racks

events.description: entering traditional Japanese village area with wooden farmhouses
approaching a burning campfire near the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking past traditional wooden buildings with thatched roofs and fish drying racks

entered.detail: traditional Japanese roof with straw thatching on the farmhouse
wooden structure with hanging items for drying
burning fire pit with smoke rising

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small traditional village with wooden farmhouses and thatched roofs. Wooden drying racks line the path, and a campfire burns ahead near the cliff edge. The rock arch formation moves to the left as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge overlooking the ocean

events.description: leaving village and reaching coastal cliff with expansive ocean view
turning slightly right to follow the cliff edge path along the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge overlooking the ocean waves with the sun setting on the horizon

entered.detail: expansive ocean view with waves and purple-orange sunset reflection
rocky cliff edge dropping down to the ocean water
snow-capped mountain range visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a coastal cliff with a panoramic view of the ocean at sunset. The path follows the cliff edge with waves crashing below, and distant snow-capped mountains are visible across the water. The village structures are left behind as the character continues along the rugged coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic mountain pass into a vast, open coastal vista at sunset. It begins by trailing the character through a narrow path enclosed by towering rocky cliffs, passing a single lit torch embedded in the stone. As the terrain opens up, the scene shifts into wide grasslands where golden grass sways beside a running stream, leading the way toward a distant rock arch and the labeled region of Musha Island. The camera then glides into a traditional village of thatched-roof farmhouses and wooden drying racks, passing a burning campfire as the rock formation recedes to the left. Finally, the path emerges from the village onto a rugged cliff edge, revealing a panoramic view of crashing ocean waves and distant snow-capped mountains under a setting sun.
